body_transformation: The rounded head retains its expressive eye shape but now features translucent skin revealing swirling crimson mist within its hollow eye sockets, while the sharp teeth glow faintly with pale silver energy. The pale cream underbelly transforms into a semi-transparent silver membrane with ghostly white ripples distorting the air above it, and the dark blue spikes dissolve into wispy violet tendrils that trail shadowy vapour. The curled spiral tail tip becomes a tattered, wispy appendage with internal energy currents visible through its semi-transparent texture, and the pointed ear tufts now shimmer with faint mist-like trails. The quadruped stance remains intact but the four legs appear slightly dissolved at the edges, blending into the surrounding air with subtle energy ripples.
signature_feature: Tail tip: tattered wispy appendage with internal energy currents visible through semi-transparent texture.
